response.justification: While Bogdan possesses exceptional technical depth and clearly understands OOP, agile practices, and software architecture, he is dramatically overqualified for a junior entry-level role. His Staff Engineer seniority, 15+ years of experience, and current role at re:cinq present a severe retention risk and compensation mismatch. More critically, his German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic,' falling well short of the 'strong verbal and written communication in German and English' required for client-facing consulting work in the German insurance sector.
strengths: Extensive OOP expertise across Java, C++, and multiple languages with demonstrable ability to architect complex systems
Proven commitment to software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pair programming) and ability to mentor others through workshops and teaching
Cloud technology experience (AWS CDK) and modern development methodologies aligned with agile digitalization projects
concerns: Severe overqualification as a Staff Engineer applying for a junior entry-level position indicates high flight risk and likely salary expectation mismatch
German language proficiency is only 'Basic' when the role requires strong communication in German with insurance clients and German-based teams
No demonstrated experience in the insurance sector, and entire recent employment history is Brazil-based despite current Berlin location, raising questions about relocation commitment
